Title: Communication Style Assessment
Description: Reflect on how you communicate in written, verbal, and digital contexts to identify your strengths and development areas.
SchemaJson: {"id":"communication_style_v1","title":"Communication Style Assessment","version":"1.0","questions":[{"id":"q1","type":"choice","label":"How would you describe your natural communication style?","options":["Direct and concise","Detailed and thorough","Collaborative and inclusive","Expressive and persuasive","Reserved and listener-first"],"required":true},{"id":"q2","type":"rating","label":"How confident are you in your written communication (emails, reports, messages)?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q3","type":"rating","label":"How confident are you speaking in meetings, presentations, or group settings?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q4","type":"choice","label":"Which communication situation do you find most challenging?","options":["Delivering difficult feedback","Presenting to senior stakeholders","Disagreeing professionally","Writing clearly and concisely","Active listening without interrupting"],"required":true},{"id":"q5","type":"text","label":"Describe a recent communication situation that did not go as well as you hoped. What happened?","required":false}]}
